# Linear Moveout Correction

**Summary**: A method to flatten seismic events by applying a constant velocity shift based on offset.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-awais|Awais, 2022]] applied linear moveout (LMO) correction to determine optimal velocities and identify signal clusters in the LMO image.
